query:
INSERT INTO
            proof_compression_jobs_fri (
                l1_batch_number,
                chain_id,
                priority,
                fri_proof_blob_url,
                status,
                created_at,
                updated_at,
                protocol_version,
                protocol_version_patch,
                batch_sealed_at
            )
            VALUES
            ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'queued', NOW(), NOW(), $5, $6, $7)
            ON CONFLICT (l1_batch_number, chain_id) DO NOTHING
